name: Debbie's Bread Pudding
recipeIngredient: 8 slices of egg bread (cubed or cut into 1/4 inch pieces)
2 cups cream or half and half
1/4 cup Grand Marnier or a good whiskey
recipeInstructions:
1. Butter the bread slices and arrange, buttered side down, in a 10-inch baking dish.
2. Combine all the other ingredients in a bowl and whisk together until well blended.
3. Pour the mixture over the bread in the baking dish.
4. Bake at 325°F for about 45 minutes. For a very moist finished product, use a water bath.
